title: 有馬記念の後に・努力より尊いもの

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The legend... has been rewritten.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: OOOH YEAH! How ya like dem apples?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan is victorious! With all her effort, she
manages to surpass both Oguri and McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Hey, Trainer! Woo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I give her a great big hug. Her body is still hot
from the race, and she's trembling like a child.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations. I'm glad we could have a good
race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Oguri...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Come on, let's go to the winner's circle. You're
number one today, Mejiro Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I really did it! YEAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan shouts with pride as she's announced
the winner.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to you all, I was able to achieve my goal
of winning both the Takarazuka and Arima Grand
Prix races.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I believe it's because of all the time I put toward
this. The right effort will always be rewarded.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But there's something even more important than
effort.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
More important than effort? This is the first time
I've heard her say that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's... having someone who watches over and
recognizes all that effort, day in and day out!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
If you all weren't watching... If you didn't vote for
me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Then I wouldn't be any different from who I was
before my debut, when I had zero confidence in
myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But I had a person who believed in me, who
helped me as I kept on training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That person is the reason I'm standing here now.
They believed in me, even when I didn't!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to them... I'm the person you see here
today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I unconsciously clench my fists as I reflect on
Mejiro Ryan's words.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So please, everyone. Never give up on yourself.
Even if you don't shine the brightest right now,
you can still become a star.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Heck, someone like me won two Grand Prix. If I
can do it, so can you! As long as you try, your
path to the future will open!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I ran today so that I could say this to all of you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much, for all your support! Thank
yoouuu!

text_block_list.name: Gentleman with a Beret
text_block_list.text: Ryan! Oh, Ryan! I knew this day would come!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fans, and this particular gentleman, are
ecstatic. Even Mejiro McQueen is crying. As for
Oguri Cap...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm... I guess I have some unfinished business left.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I thought I'd done everything there was to do in
the Twinkle Series, but now...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I want to race Mejiro Ryan one more—no, a few
more times.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The look in her eyes is that of someone
completely enchanted. Mejiro Ryan is able to
captivate even the most famous of racers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, with a very emotional finale, the Arima
Kinen ends.
